reference_role: User image: composition and expressive-mascot-density reference only; do not copy any exact character, costume, pose, layout, text, or watermark.
asset_type: wide 2:1 weapon-space character composition for a game weapon finish
prompt: Create an original flat cartoon composition called Night Shift Critters in metadata only; render no text. Do not draw a gun. On a deep navy 2:1 orthographic canvas, place a large silver-gray mechanic cat with a teal visor and expressive raised eyebrow at normalized canvas position (0.45, 0.20), designed as the receiver hero. Place a cheerful golden pug co-pilot with a violet headset at (0.50, 0.56) as the magazine secondary character. Place two or three smaller original cat/dog faces around (0.14, 0.31) for the stock. Use paw-shaped graphic connectors and broad color blocks through (0.72, 0.11) for the handguard. Keep everything right of x=0.84 quiet, dark, and low-detail for the muzzle. Thick near-black outlines, large readable expressions, playful asymmetry, clean flat colors with subtle cel shading, no tiny repetitive texture. Palette: #0A102A, #F6C85F, #FF7A59, #43D9C5, #8A6CFF, #F4F1DE. Original characters only. No copied mascots, no recognizable franchise style, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no brands, no watermark, no weapon silhouette, no photorealism, no skulls, no military insignia.
